Every day, WITI’s group chats buzz with fresh links. As part of our Saturday send for paid readers, we typically round up 11 of the best. 
It’s WITI, on the weekend.
Why are these interesting?
1995’s Greater Pittsburgh bank robberies [ https://substack.com/redirect/52e84624-861f-4dd9-a44c-644a2430f479?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Wikipedia)

With animatronic apes and chocolate volcano cakes, the restaurant was built for a social media age that didn’t exist—until now.
